svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="告警路由决策树" id="routing"> <mxGraphModel dx="-634" dy="-195" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="780" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="alert" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="告警到达
（错误率 / 延迟 / 业务异常）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="430" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dedup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="去重（同服务 + 同异常，5 分钟窗口合并）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="420" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="classify" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="异常类型?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="480" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="infra" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;dashed=1;" value="基础设施异常
Connection refused / OOM
disk full" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="180" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="escalate1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="直接升级人工
（不进自愈链路）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="180" x="200" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apperr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="应用异常
NPE / SQLException / Timeout" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="240" x="700" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="diag" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="AI 诊断（5 步）
① 捞全链路日志（按 RequestId）
② 捞关联指标（前后 30 分钟）
③ bot 拉代码定位堆栈
④ LLM 分析根因 + 可修复性
⑤ 输出诊断结论" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="260" x="690" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fixable" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="可修复?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="120" x="760" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="✅ 可自动修复
→ 进第四层
（修代码 + 验证 + PR）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="240" x="430" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="⚠️ 可修但风险高
→ 生成报告 + 飞书通知
→ 人决策" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="700" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;dashed=1;" value="❌ 不可修（架构 / 不确定）
→ 生成报告 + 升级人工" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="940" y="580" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="alert" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="dedup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="dedup" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="classify"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="classify" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;fontSize=11;fontColor=#475569;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="infra" value="环境/基础设施"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="classify" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2563eb;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="apperr" value="应用异常"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="infra" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" target="escalate1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="apperr" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="diag"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="diag" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;" target="fixable"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="fixable" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2563eb;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="r1" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="fixable" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;fontSize=11;fontColor=#475569;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="r2" value="高风险"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="fixable" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#475569;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="r3" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=11;fontColor=#64748b;fontStyle=2;" value="关键：环境问题不进自愈链路 —— AI 修不了基础设施。
只有「能精准定位到代码行」的告警才进自愈。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="60" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 29px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
告警到达
（错误率 / 延迟 / 业务异常）

div.div: 去重（同服务 + 同异常，5 分钟窗口合并）

div.div:
基础设施异常

disk full

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 304px; margin-left: 141px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;

直接升级人工
（不进自愈链路）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 209px; margin-left: 641px;

NPE / SQLException / Timeout

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 248px; height: 1px; padding-top: 296px; margin-left: 642px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
AI 诊断（5 步）
① 捞全链路日志（按 RequestId）
② 捞关联指标（前后 30 分钟）
③ bot 拉代码定位堆栈
④ LLM 分析根因 + 可修复性
⑤ 输出诊断结论

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 466px; margin-left: 701px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 583px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
✅ 可自动修复
→ 进第四层
（修代码 + 验证 + PR）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 583px; margin-left: 641px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⚠️ 可修但风险高
→ 生成报告 + 飞书通知
→ 人决策

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 583px; margin-left: 881px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #475569;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#475569, #9ba7b8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
❌ 不可修（架构 / 不确定）
→ 生成报告 + 升级人工

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 408px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #64748b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#64748b, #7e8c9f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
关键：环境问题不进自愈链路 —— AI 修不了基础设施。
只有「能精准定位到代码行」的告警才进自愈。

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
